RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court adopted its tentative ruling -- DEFENDANT MICHAEL ROSS' MOTION to vacate dismissal and for an order granting defendant's motion for summary judgment -- DENIED. (DAG/301/SL) Reporter: Joseph Vickstein, CSR #4780

Off Calendar Apr-14-2003 Continued To May-02-03 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301

Benjamin C. Graves, Esq. of JACKSON & WALLACE 982-6300 for plaintiff Theresa Mitchell/Cool Ventures LLC moving for summary judgment
Michael Ross appearing in propria persona 775-8128, opposing the motion

RULING:
Upon representatin of defendant, the Court continued PLAINTIFF THERESA MITCHELL/
COOL VENTURES LLC's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT to May 2, 2003 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept.
301. Defendant is to file his opposition by 4/25. Parties also stipulated to moving
papers being served in court. (PHA/301/SL) Reporter: Robert Balian, CSR #5220

RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court adopted its tentative ruling -- DEFENDANT MICHAEL ROSS's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT -- Demurrer Overruled. Defendant has 5 days to answer. Prevailing party is to prepare an order. (DEW/301/SL) Reporter: Candace Yount, #2737

MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: Michael Ross, in propria persona, defendant and moving party. Benjamin C. Graves, Esq., Jackson & Wallace, 982-6300, for plaintiff Theresa Mitchell/Cool Ventures, LLC.
*DEFENDANT MICHAEL ROSS' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT-A R G U E D and the Court continues the matter to 3/24/03. Plaintiff received copy of defendant's demurrer today. Opposition to be filed by 3/17/03, reply due by 3/20/03 by noon. Reporter: Joseph Vickstein, #4780 (DAG/301/SL)
